name: batch_delete_feishu_bitable_records
description: Deletes multiple records from a Bitable table in one call.

appToken.description: Bitable app token (required). Found in the URL of a Feishu Bitable: `https://xxx.feishu.cn/base/{appToken}`.

tableId.description: Bitable table ID (required). Found in the URL query parameter `table={tableId}`, typically starts with "tbl".

recordIds.description: Array of record IDs to delete (required). Each ID typically starts with "rec".
